goal: On MEDIUM/LARGE plans, Orchestrator requires a diagnosis packet (reproduction_steps, root_cause_hypothesis, affected_component) before dispatching a fixable retry, and passes the packet in the retry dispatch payload

failing_phase.failure_reason: Schema fixture validation error: expected additionalProperties:false to reject unknown field 'foo', but fixture passed.

diagnosis_evidence.reproduction_steps: cd evals && npm run test:structural — fails at Pass 1 schema fixture orchestrator/invalid-foo-field.json
diagnosis_evidence.root_cause_hypothesis: The fixture payload contains a field 'foo' not present in the schema properties map, but additionalProperties is not set to false on the target sub-object.
diagnosis_evidence.stack_trace_excerpt: AJV: /properties/CoreImplementer-subagent — additionalProperties not enforced on nested shape
